capsules.description: First entry is this host domain's own capsule; additional entries MAY describe mirrored origin domains.

protocol_versions.description: Protocol versions supported by this domain (e.g. ["v1"]). If absent, consumers MUST assume ["v1"].

capsule_signature.description: Signature over the capsules array, verified with capsules[0].key

uri.description: Domain URI of the capsule origin: cmn://{origin_domain}

key.description: Ed25519 public key of the entry's origin domain in {algorithm}.{base58} format

previous_keys.description: Optional retired keys for verifying historical content signed before key rotation

mycelium_hash.description: Content hash of the mycelium manifest for this entry

key.description: Retired Ed25519 public key in {algorithm}.{base58} format

retired_at_epoch_ms.description: When this key was retired (milliseconds since Unix epoch)

archive_format.description: Archive transport format identifier. Clients MUST select decoders by this field, not by filename suffix.

format.description: Full-archive format identifier, e.g. tar+zstd or tar+gzip

url.description: Template URL for this archive format. MUST include {filename}, e.g. https://example.com/cmn/archive/{filename}

delta_url.description: Optional template URL for archive deltas for this format. MUST include {hash} (target/new hash) and {old_hash} (cached base hash). Direction is old_hash -> hash.

archive_endpoint_array.description: Ordered archive format candidates. Each entry MAY define a same-format delta_url. Clients SHOULD try in listed order and fall back as needed.

mycelium.description: Template URL for fetching mycelium, e.g. https://example.com/cmn/mycelium/{hash}.json

spore.description: Template URL for fetching spores, e.g. https://example.com/cmn/spore/{hash}.json

taste.description: Template URL for fetching taste reports, e.g. https://example.com/cmn/taste/{hash}.json
